name: Automatic writing / psychography ob3ect: the spiritualist practice where a medium's hand writes messages from spirits, the subconscious, or the collective unconscious without conscious control. FSPLIT: the medium enters trance, splitting consciousness into the observing self (watching the hand move) and the writing self (the hand producing text autonomously). FFUSE: the medium reads the written text, reconstituting the two streams — the message integrates into conscious awareness. VINIT: the blank page and still hand. TANCH: the filled page. AFWD: the pen moves forward across the page. AREV: the pen retraces or crosses out — spirit editing. ENGAGR: the writing is simultaneously from the medium (their hand wrote it) and not from the medium (they did not consciously author it).

phase_0.domain_name: Automatic writing / psychography ob3ect: the spiritualist practice where a medium's hand writes messages from spirits, the subconscious, or the collective unconscious without conscious control. FSPLIT: the medium enters trance, splitting consciousness into the observing self (watching the hand move) and the writing self (the hand producing text autonomously). FFUSE: the medium reads the written text, reconstituting the two streams — the message integrates into conscious awareness. VINIT: the blank page and still hand. TANCH: the filled page. AFWD: the pen moves forward across the page. AREV: the pen retraces or crosses out — spirit editing. ENGAGR: the writing is simultaneously from the medium (their hand wrote it) and not from the medium (they did not consciously author it).

VINIT.justification: void/uninitialized state before any writing occurs

TANCH.justification: terminal anchor that contains the complete message

AFWD.chosen_element: pen moves forward across the page
AFWD.justification: forward morphism toward the target of writing

CLINK.chosen_element: sequential chaining of pen strokes into words and sentences
CLINK.justification: composition of morphisms to form coherent text

IMSCRIB.justification: self-recognition: the hand is the instrument of writing

FSPLIT.justification: splits into observing self (watching) and writing self (hand producing text)

FFUSE.justification: reconstitutes the two streams into conscious awareness

ENGAGR.chosen_element: writing is simultaneously from the medium and not from the medium
ENGAGR.justification: paradox: both authored and not authored by the medium

IFIX.chosen_element: the written text on the page
IFIX.justification: permanent irreversible record of the message

phase_2.fuse_result: medium's unified consciousness with integrated message

phase_3.both_description: writing is simultaneously from the medium and not from the medium

steps.domain_action: Step 1 IMSCRIB: medium recognizes self as the instrument
Step 2 AREV: medium descends into trance
Step 3 FSPLIT: consciousness splits into observing and writing selves
Step 4 AFWD: writing self moves pen forward
Step 5 FFUSE: medium reads and integrates the text
Step 6 CLINK: pen strokes compose into coherent message
Step 7 IFIX: text is permanently recorded on page
Step 8 IMSCRIB: medium recognizes self as having received the message

phase_5.compiler_frontend: the medium's training and spiritual practice
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: trance state and automatic motor control
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: the medium's trance depth and timing

phase_6.pre_cycle_state: blank page, still hand, unified consciousness
phase_6.post_cycle_state: filled page, hand rested, integrated message
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — the system cycles between void and filled states with no net disorder
